title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: This video explains diffusion models as a process and framework for generation, covering their progression, strengths, and weaknesses. It discusses how diffusion can be implemented with various architectures including transformers, and explores the theoretical foundations and practical applications of diffusion-based approaches.
